user_system_path: Owner-named maintenance seam (no GitHub issue): green the two frontend config-gate tests that were red on main. (1) tests/config/__tests__/design-system-buttons.test.ts failed because app/pricing/page.tsx used the banned raw touch-height primitive min-h-[48px]; replaced with min-h-[44px], the app-wide standard. (2) tests/config/__tests__/frontend-product-truth-gate.test.ts failed because REQUIRED_HOMEPAGE_COPY still required a phrase that lived only in the FINAL CTA section #414 (a477e58) intentionally removed; dropped it from the required list. Scoped to allow exactly these files; the contract is restored to the between-rungs form in the same branch so main stays clean. Constraint: NO paid API calls — proven in the local harness.
allowed_files_raw: Owner-named maintenance seam: only the two config-gate-fix files (app/pricing/page.tsx + tests/config/**) plus control-plane + docs may change.
forbidden_files_raw: No schema/api/lib/deps changes — this seam is a frontend config-gate fix only.
required_local_proof: npx vitest run tests/config/__tests__/design-system-buttons.test.ts tests/config/__tests__/frontend-product-truth-gate.test.ts && npm run gate:continuity
required_browser_proof: Load /pricing and confirm both CTAs render with min-height 44px and no console errors.
browser_proof_command: preview_start Next.js Dev; navigate /pricing; assert both CTA buttons compute min-height: 44px
acceptance_condition: Both named config-gate tests pass; typecheck + lint + build clean; gate:continuity green; /pricing renders correctly; contract restored to between-rungs scope before merge.
anti_regression_checks: no min-h-[48px] or rounded-button in any TSX
stop_condition: Stop when both config-gate tests are green, the fix is merged, and the control plane is rolled back to the clean between-rungs form.
next_command: After merge, roll the control plane back to the between-rungs form (active_issue: none, contract scope = control-plane + docs only) and await the owner's next named seam.
